creator: delphij@delphij.net
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA256

I think passing through vis(3) is intentional.  The code is added on
Apr 16, 1994 where the log was:

run the environment and arguments through strvis, so we don't
whack on the terminal
From: "Chris G. Demetriou" <cgd@nobozo.CS.Berkeley.EDU>

We probably need to fix vis(3) and make it support multiple byte
characters by the way.

Cheers,
